positive: Minimalist illustration of a smiling raccoon wearing a small beret and reading a book, positioned centrally against a solid, muted pastel blue background. The style is clean, vector-art inspired, line-drawing with solid block colors, reminiscent of Nordic folk art or mid-century Scandinavian illustration. The raccoon has distinct, expressive eyes and gentle contours. The lighting is flat and even, maximizing silhouette clarity. Composition should be highly graphic and suitable for small-to-medium-sized chest prints. Use a color palette limited to charcoal grey, warm cream, and forest green accents. High detail, crisp edges, perfect proportions, isolated subject.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low detail, text, watermarks, signature, messy, cluttered, dirty background, grainy, out of focus, watermark
